title: EPA v. FRANKS VACUUM TRUCK SERVICE INC
text:
EPA Enforcement Case 01-2003-0107: FRANKS VACUUM TRUCK SERVICE INC
Type: RCRA 3008A AO For Comp And/Or Penalty
Status: Final Order Issued
Outcome: Final Order With Penalty
Relief Sought: Penalty
Lead Agency: EPA

Case Summary:
COMPLAINT AND CAFO AGAINST A HAZARDOUS WASTE TRANSPORTER INVOLVING THE TRANSPORTATION OF HAZARDOUS WASTE FROM THE U.S. INTO CANADA RESULTING IN UNIFORM HAZARDOUS WASTE MANIFEST ON THE PART OF THE TRANSPORTER.

Penalties and Costs:
Federal Penalty: $7,500
Compliance Action Cost: $100

Laws and Sections Violated:
  RCRA: 3003: Standards Applicable to Transporters of Hazardous Waste (Gen Hazardous Waste Management - Subtitle C - Transporter Requirements)

Regulatory Citations:
  40 CFR Part 263 Section 20(b)
  40 CFR Part 263 Section 20(g)(2)
  40 CFR Part 263 Section 20(g)(1)

Defendants:
  FRANK VACUUM TRUCK SERVICE INC

Facilities:
  US CUSTOMS PORT, ROADSIDE CHECK, HIGHGATE SPRINGS, VT
  FRANKS VACUUM TRUCK SERVICE INC, 1717 NEW RD, NIAGARA FALLS, NY

Case Milestones:
  07/01/2003: Complaint Filed/Proposed Order
  08/28/2003: Enforcement Action Data Entered
  12/05/2003: Final Order Issued

Enforcement Conclusion #1: Administrative Penalty Order With or Without Injunctive Relief
  Name: FRANKS VACUUM TRUCK SERVICE INC
  Settlement Entered: 12/05/2003
  Federal Penalty: $7,500
enforcement_type: RCRA 3008A AO For Comp And/Or Penalty
